title: quercus augustinei
intro: Quercus augustinei, also known as the Himalayan red oak, is a deciduous tree species native to the Himalayan region. The leaves and bark of the Quercus augustinei plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Quercus augustinei include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Quercus augustinei can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and digestive issues.
